description: Cross-field validation via predicate args (§55.11). confirm req eq(@signup.password): typing password "secret12" then a non-matching confirm "different" → confirm.errors carries .EqFailed(expected=the password value), confirm.isValid false, and the compound rollup false — while password itself is valid.
rationale: §55.11: cross-field falls out of the universal-core vocabulary when a predicate arg references another cell; eq(@signup.password) makes confirm's validity depend on password. §55.9 EqFailed carries the expected (the referenced cell's current value).
